summary: Unpremultiply a premultiplied linear color image (C = C' / alpha where alpha > eps); alpha passes through. Rejected on nonlinear (srgb) input.

inputs.name: image
inputs.doc: The linear-light color image with an alpha channel.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The image with its alpha representation flipped (same extent/layout).

perceptual.reason: alpha.unpremultiply is a closed-form per-channel divide by coverage with an explicit near-zero-alpha policy, verified by an analytic round-trip and a hidden-RGB fringe fixture; there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
